name: Magma Labs Studio
summary: A free, open-source suite of creative apps from Magma Labs — built to integrate, each ready to stand on its own.

apps.name: Event Control Panel
apps.summary: Intercom, audio, and visuals unified into a single page.

apps.name: Capture
apps.summary: Control and independently record multiple video and audio streams at once.

apps.name: Keyframe
apps.summary: An easy-to-use 3D animation tool with native support for STEP model assemblies.
